Eurovision Song Contest

🇳🇱2020

Rotterdam Ahoy · Rotterdam , Netherlands

"Open Up"

Hosted by Edsilia Rombley · Chantal Janzen · Jan Smit · Nikkie de Jager Broadcaster AVROTROS · NOS · NPO

Contest cancelled

This edition was cancelled and no performances took place. 41 acts had been selected before cancellation.
